title: Rework Gate Verdict Schema
description: Decision output from the rework gate step. Determines whether implementation passes quality bar or requires rework.

decision.description: Gate verdict: pass allows PR creation, fail triggers rework loop

critical.description: Count of critical-severity findings (maps from critical)

major.description: Count of major-severity findings (maps from high)

minor.description: Count of minor-severity findings (maps from medium)

suggestion.description: Count of suggestion-level findings (maps from low + info)

aggregated_feedback.description: On fail: consolidated feedback for the rework step describing what needs to be fixed

blocking_findings.description: List of findings that caused the gate to fail
